question: Which year from 2008-2010 has the lowest total MTA ridership? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A transit researcher wants to identify the lowest ridership year during the early recession period.

1.fact: Summing Ridership by year (from Month) for 2008-2010, 2008 has the lowest total at 309142204.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2008-2010 has the lowest total MTA ridership? (Parse Month to Year; sum Ridership by Year; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum Ridership by year (2008-2010) and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2008.
